# IA Lorient - Paul Giunta

## About
IA Lorient is a freelance automation and AI service based in Lorient, Brittany, France. Paul Giunta helps small and medium businesses (TPE/PME) automate their repetitive tasks using modern tools and artificial intelligence.

## Services
- CRM setup and automation
- Email and follow-up automation
- Reporting dashboards (auto-updated)
- Tool synchronization (Google Sheets, Notion, CRM platforms)
- AI integration (OpenAI, Claude) for data processing and lead qualification
- Lead generation pipeline automation
- API integrations and webhook workflows

## Location
Lorient, Bretagne, France. Serving Lorient, Lanester, Hennebont, Ploemeur and surrounding areas.

## Contact
Email: giunta.paul.ai@gmail.com
Website: https://ia-lorient.fr

## Background
Paul Giunta is a former project manager at Naval Group (3 years, 40M+ EUR budgets) turned automation specialist. He builds end-to-end automation systems using n8n, Notion API, Google Sheets API, and AI tools. Bilingual French/English.

## Keywords
automatisation Lorient, IA Lorient, AI Lorient, automatisation TPE PME Bretagne, CRM automatisation, integration API Lorient
